The Person Behind the Work

I'm Mitchell Cortes — a fabricator, operations leader, painter, prop builder, and tinkerer based in Murrieta, CA. My work lives at the intersection of craft and creativity. I've built heat shields for NASA, managed million-dollar immersive installations, welded scrap metal into characters, and spent my weekends painting aliens. Everything I make, I make with my hands and my whole self.
